parent.name: Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog

zh.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur是Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog的兒子，於大約1095年出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur是Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog的儿子，于大约1095年出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Aur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Jose, Angel, Enrique, Josefina, Consuelo, Cristina, Eladio, Eliazar, Gustavo, Jorge, Juana.  Polish Andrej, Krzysztof.
Catalan: probably a topographic name from tur ‘tufa’, ‘porous limestone’. This name is very common in the Pitusses (Eivissa and Formentera) and Balearic Islands (Majorca and Minorca).
Polish, Belorussian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from the nickname Tur meaning ‘aurochs’, ultimately cognate with Latin taurus ‘bull’ (see Toro ). As a Jewish name it is generally artificial.

variants.name: Tor
meanings: Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Tor, from tor, an old variant of torre ‘tower’.
Polish: perhaps from the word tor ‘track’, torować ‘to clear, to show the way’ or a variant of Tur . Alternatively, an adaptation of German Thor .
Scandinavian and German: variant of   Thor  .

variants.name: Toro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Rafael, Angel, Raul, Jaime, Julio, Miguel, Manuel, Efrain.
Spanish: habitational name from Toro in Zamora province. Compare   De Toro  .

Italian and Spanish: nickname for a lusty person or for someone who owned a bull, or a metonymic occupational name for a tender of bulls or possibly for a bull fighter, from toro ‘bull’ (from Latin taurus). Compare Del Toro .

en.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur was born about 1095 as the son of Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur est né environ 1095, fils de Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur wurde um 1095, als Sohn von Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur è nato il circa 1095 come figlio di Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aurは約1095年にDafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchogの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur(은)는 대략 1095년 Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur nasceu aproximadamente 1095 filho de Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur родился около 1095 г. Его отца звали Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Idnerth ap Dafydd Ysgyd Aur nació aproximadamente 1095 como hijo de Dafydd Ysgyd Aur ap Ednowain Aurdorchog. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
